name: ATX-201
description: ATX-201 is one of a family of novel compounds that inhibits microtubule polymerization. It is developed by Kythera Biopharmaceuticals, Inc. for the treatment of actinic keratosis. The company announced the decision to discontinue its ATX-201 clinical program for actinic keratosis. The Company determined that the program was not meeting their expected primary and exploratory objectives.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in actinic keratosis.
